error_signature: real IP address returned instead of proxy IP
title: HTTP Request node not using proxy correctly
symptom: The HTTP Request node returns the real IP address instead of the expected proxy IP when making requests.
applies_when: Configured with a proxy for web scraping
not_this_if: Different IP returned in other tests
root_cause: The proxy URL format used in the HTTP Request node is incorrect. The node requires a specific format for the proxy URL, which includes the protocol and proper credentials.
fix_steps: Open the HTTP Request node settings
Test the HTTP Request node again
agent_instruction: Update the proxy URL format in the HTTP Request node settings to include 'http://' at the beginning.
